description: You are a travel clerk at a boutique travel agency. A client named Margaret Chen has booked a Pacific Coast Highway road trip from San Francisco, CA to Los Angeles, CA. Research the scenic coastal route (Highway 1/Pacific Coast Highway) to determine the total driving distance and estimated time. Identify at least three notable cities or landmarks along the route for sightseeing detours and check the current weather conditions for Los Angeles. Compile this information into a professional itinerary and save it to /home/ga/Desktop/pacific_coast_itinerary.txt. The document must include the client's name, route summary, distance, driving time, the three recommended waypoints with brief descriptions, the Los Angeles weather outlook, and practical travel tips.
